entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The region in Africa where the agricultural systems are studied.

entities.name: DRY SAVANNAS
entities.description: The specific environmental zone in West Africa characterized by dry conditions.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The long-term shift in temperatures and weather patterns affecting agriculture.

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions affecting crops and livestock.

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Harmful organisms that damage crops and livestock.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall leading to water shortage.

entities.name: POOR SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The lack of essential nutrients in the soil required for crop growth.

entities.name: STRIGA HERMONTHICA
entities.description: A parasitic weed that constrains agricultural production.

entities.name: CROP-LIVESTOCK INTEGRATION
entities.description: The practice of combining crop and livestock production systems.

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Grass-like plants grown for their edible grains.

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Plants of the legume family used for food and soil nitrogen fixation.

entities.name: CEREAL-LEGUME ROTATION/INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of rotating or growing cereals and legumes together.

entities.name: PEST RESISTANCE/TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a cultivar to withstand or resist pest attacks.

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY RESTORATION
entities.description: Practices aimed at returning nutrients to the soil.

entities.name: INTEGRATED GENETIC AND NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A holistic approach combining genetic improvement and resource management.

entities.name: ECO-EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ability to produce more with fewer resources and less environmental impact.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER INCOME
entities.description: The earnings of small-scale farmers.

entities.name: EXTENSION METHODS
entities.description: Techniques used to communicate agricultural research to farmers.

entities.name: IMPROVED AGRICULTURAL TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Advanced farming techniques and tools developed to increase productivity.

relationships.source: INTEGRATED GENETIC AND NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
